content: ve January 2024 and supersede prior versions.

Note: Parental Leave (26 weeks) must not be confused with Sick Leave (5 days). They appear i
n adjacent rows but are entirely different entitlements.

Sick leave is available to all
employees from day one of
employment. A maximum of five
days per calendar year may be
taken. Sick leave does not carry
forward to the next year and is
not encashable on exit.
A medical certificate is required
for absences longer than two
consecutive working days.

Parental leave is available to
employees after one year of
continuous service. Eligible
employees are entitled to twenty
six (26) weeks of leave per
child. Parental leave must be
applied for at least 30 days in
advance where possible.
Parental leave is separate from
and additional to earned leave.

[TABLE]
Leave Type: Sick Leave | Eligibility: All employees | Entitlement: 5 days / year | Carry Forward: No
Leave Type: Casual Leave | Eligibility: All employees | Entitlement: 12 days / year | Carry Forward: No
Leave Type: Earned Leave | Eligibility: After 1 year | Entitlement: 18 days / year | Carry Forward: Up to 30 days
Leave Type: Parental Leave | Eligibility: After 1 year | Entitlement: 26 weeks | Carry Forward: No
Leave Type: Bereavement | Eligibility: All employees | Entitlement: 5 days / event | Carry Forward: No
